untranslatable_reason: Head-and-Shoulders pattern requires multi-bar structural analysis (identification of left shoulder, head, right shoulder, and neckline troughs across 5+ bars). Available indicators cannot detect this complex geometric formation. The measure rule (target = neckline - formation_height) requires manual fractal detection. Only the breakout component (close < dc_lower) and confirmation signals (price_pos_20, adx_14, vol_ratio_20) can be approximated.
